commit.message:
fix: move action_result inside state to match Yandex Smart Home API

Per Yandex Smart Home API spec and dext0r reference implementation,
action_result must be nested inside the 'state' object alongside
'instance' and 'value', not as a sibling of 'state'.

Before: {type, state: {instance, value}, action_result: {status}}
After:  {type, state: {instance, value, action_result: {status}}}

Introduced CapabilityActionResultState dataclass to hold the correct
structure.

commit.message:
Fix app hang on quit during recording

_quit_app() called engine.stop() on the main UI thread, which
does .join(timeout=600) on writer and transcriber threads —
blocking the UI completely.

Fix: if recording is active, run the shutdown in a background
thread (same pattern as _stop_recording), then destroy the root
window via after(0). If not recording, destroy immediately.

commit.message:
EXP-1171-1180: Causal benchmark — LSTM overfits, Enhanced XGBoost CV=0.477

Key discoveries:
- LSTM pipeline HURTS in 5-fold CV (-0.068) — was overfitting single split
- Enhanced features are TRUE BEST: +0.023 in CV, all 11 patients improve
- XGBoost hyperparameter tuning: +0.026 (11/11 wins)
- Multi-horizon regularization: +0.013 (11/11 wins)
- Residual autocorrelation=0.474 — temporal structure exists but LSTM can't capture it
- Raw glucose encoding is optimal over delta/relative/quantile
- Per-patient optimal depth varies: d3 (small) to d8 (complex)
- Revised SOTA: R²=0.477 (5-fold CV) vs previous R²=0.581 (overfitted single split)

Campaign total: 180 experiments (EXP-1001-1180), validated Δ=+0.123 over naive baseline.

commit.message:
Fix missing _transcript_see_end method causing transcription to stop

Previous edit accidentally merged _transcript_see_end() into
_hide_progress_bar(), so the method didn't exist. Every call to
_set_transcript_text / _append / _batch_append raised
AttributeError, which killed the poll loop's after() chain.
Once the chain broke, the transcription queue was never drained,
the progress bar stayed stuck, and restarting recording couldn't
recover because the poll was dead.

Fixes:
- Restore _transcript_see_end() as its own method
- Wrap the poll body in try/except so the after() chain never
  breaks even if an error occurs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Consolidate subprocess calls to reduce UAC prompts (5→2)

- Merge msstore is_available() into _get_name_map(): the availability
  check now defers to the full query instead of spawning a separate
  PowerShell process. Reduces 2 PS calls → 1.

- Merge scoop is_available() into _raw_names(): availability is
  determined from the scoop list result, not a separate --version
  call. Reduces 2 cmd.exe calls → 1.

- Combine registry scan + Microsoft Store query into a single
  PowerShell invocation (_run_combined_powershell). Both datasets
  are returned from one process, separated by a sentinel line.
  Reduces 2 PS calls → 1.

- Add _populate_from_raw() to MicrosoftStoreManager so the combined
  runner can feed AppX output directly without a second PS call.

Net result: 5 process launches (3 PS + 2 cmd) → 2 (1 PS + 1 cmd),
reducing corporate privilege management (BeyondTrust) prompts
from 5 to 2.

330 tests passing.

Fix probability distribution collapse, tooltip CSS visibility, and conclusion phrasing (#91)

- backend/intelligence/evented_pipeline.py:
  - Add _LIE_SIM_AMPLIFICATION=4 constant: raises lie_sim to power 4 before
    computing Bayesian posterior, spreading [0.79,1.0] cosine cluster from
    compressed ~52%/45% to differentiated ~54%/20%/20% distributions
  - Replace _ENTROPY_COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD with _COLLAPSE_TOP_PROB_FLOOR and
    _COLLAPSE_GAP_FLOOR for more intuitive collapse detection
  - Fix inverted distribution-collapse warning logic (collapse = uniform = low gap)
  - Fix dual_results pairing: match by (pattern_a, pattern_b, pattern_c) key
    instead of array index to avoid wrong tooltip data on mismatched transitions
  - Update tooltip_data.bayesian to include lie_sim_amplified, amplification
    fields and mention the ^k formula in the calculation string
  - Update tooltip_data.lie_algebra note to explain the amplification
  - Add dual_integration nonlinear emergence dims to tooltip_data
  - Change _evidence_summary_raw from "Primary projected outcome: ..." to
    "Likely outcome (XX%): ..." for analyst-readable language
  - Remove max(posterior, 1e-4) floor in composition path; inverse path keeps
    the small floor so low-probability high-impact paths remain visible

- frontend/app.py:
  - Add CSS overrides for Streamlit container overflow:visible so tooltip box
    is not clipped by parent layout containers
  - Change tooltip position from bottom: calc(100%+8px) to top: calc(100%+6px)
    (show below, not above) to avoid top-overflow clipping
  - Expand _prob_tooltip_html to show lie_sim_amplified, note, dual nonlinear
    emergence dims, consistency score, and verdict in tooltip
  - Add hoverable probability badge to Conclusion tab using top probability
    tree node so users can inspect the math from the Conclusion tab directly

- tests/test_evented_pipeline.py:
  - Import new constants _LIE_SIM_AMPLIFICATION, _COLLAPSE_TOP_PROB_FLOOR,
    _COLLAPSE_GAP_FLOOR
  - Add TestProbabilityDistributionSpread: 3 tests verifying top probability
    > floor and top1-top2 gap > floor (detects distribution collapse)
  - Add TestTooltipDataFields: 7 tests verifying all required tooltip_data
    fields present (bayesian, lie_algebra, dual_integration, patterns) and
    formula mentions amplification and lie_sim_amplified is consistent

- tests/test_pipeline_schema_contract.py:

    "Likely outcome" and "Primary projected outcome" prefixes

feat(sprint-9): R-04 Dante auto-reconnect, R-11 SCHED_FIFO RT, R-12 DSP alloc notes, R-13 ETag locking, S-04 TLS via rustls

R-04: Dante device task wrapped in exponential-backoff retry loop (2s→60s).
      Shutdown signal cancels both the retry and the delay.
R-11: try_set_rt_priority_once() sets SCHED_FIFO pri 90 on first DSP callback
      invocation (Linux only, thread-local flag, needs CAP_SYS_NICE or rtprio limit).
R-12: Audit comments on hot-path allocs in audio callback; future D-01 work.
R-13: state_version AtomicU64 in AppState; bump_version()/etag() helpers.
      GET /api/v1/state returns ETag header (W/"N").
      PATCH /api/v1/matrix/:in/:out checks If-Match and returns 412 on mismatch.
      All other mutation handlers (mute/solo/name/gain/load-scene) bump version.
S-04: axum-server + rustls optional feature 'tls'. --tls-cert/--tls-key CLI args
      (PATCHBOX_TLS_CERT/PATCHBOX_TLS_KEY env vars). Build with --features tls
      to enable HTTPS. Without the flag, falls back to plain HTTP.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: Set embedding_model default to match current .env (Qwen3-Embedding-8B)

The embedding_model default was hardcoded to BAAI/bge-m3 (1024-dim),
but .env uses Qwen/Qwen3-Embedding-8B (4096-dim), causing a dimension
mismatch when ChromaDB collection was initialized.

Now the default matches the actual .env configuration, ensuring
consistency between the model used for embedding and the collection
dimension.

commit.message:
fix: restore `override` lock-file handling after launcher refactor (#4532)

* fix: update test to assert warnings for invalid CLI arguments

* chore: adding changelog file 4519.fixed.md [dependabot-skip]

* feat: add log printing step to test-remote workflow for better debugging

* fix: clear MAPDL database before resume() to prevent segfault in LoadElements

MAPDL was crashing with a Segmentation Violation in LoadElements during
CI. The crash was triggered by the _save_selection context manager
(which creates temporary __CMP_*__ components and runs NSLE/LoadElements)
encountering a stale or inconsistent database state left over from a
previous test.

Root cause: function-scoped resume() fixtures in test_post.py, and
class-scoped setup fixtures in test_component.py and
test_component_queries.py, were loading or creating database state
without first clearing any leftover state from prior tests.

Changes:
- tests/test_post.py: add clear(mapdl) before mapdl.resume() in all
  four resume fixtures (Test_static_solve, Test_plastic_solve,
  Test_contact_solve, Test_thermal_solve); remove redundant prep7()/
  solution() calls superseded by clear(); make Test_thermal_solve
  inherit TestClass for consistent class-level cleanup; import clear
  from conftest
- tests/test_component.py: add clear(mapdl) at the start of
  Test_components.setup to make the cleanup explicit and remove
  the implicit ordering dependency on TestClass.initializer; import
  clear from conftest
- tests/test_inline_functions/test_component_queries.py: add
  clear(mapdl) at the start of solved_box and twisted_sheet class-
  scoped fixtures; import clear from conftest
- docker/testing/Dockerfile: enable PYMAPDL_DEBUG_TESTING for better
  CI diagnostics
- docker/testing/docker-compose.yml: comment out custom entrypoint/
  command to restore default MAPDL startup behaviour

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: unused import

* fix: restore override lock-file handling after launcher refactor

The check_lock_file() logic was not ported when launcher.py was split
into modules in PR #4416.  As a result, override=True had no effect and
MAPDL would fail to start whenever a stale .lock file existed in the
run_location directory.

- validation.py: add _validate_lock_file(); raises an error when a lock
  file is present and override=False, or a warning when override=True
  (file will be removed before launch).  Called from validate_config().
- process.py: add _handle_lock_file(); deletes the lock file when
  override=True, raises LockFileException when override=False (safety
  net in case validation was bypassed).  Called at the top of
  launch_mapdl_process().
- tests: 5 new tests in TestValidateLockFile, 6 in TestHandleLockFile.

Fixes #4526

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
